name: kaggle-tabular
description: Grandmaster-grade, validation-first workflow for solo tabular Kaggle competitions: leakage hard-rules, a gated 8-phase loop, an OOF artifact contract, a scaffolder + rule-encoding template, and multi-agent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Validation-first workflow for solo tabular Kaggle competitions
interface.longDescription: Grandmaster-grade discipline for tabular competitions: trustworthy CV first, diverse baselines, hypothesis-driven feature engineering, light tuning, and serious ensembling — every experiment emits OOF + test preds + a ledger row under frozen folds.
